components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button used for main CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #c5a059; color: #0a0a0a; padding: 16px 32px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 2px; border: none; font-family: sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #d9b978; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #c5a059; padding: 16px 32px; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 2px; border: 2px solid #c5a059; font-family: sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s, border-color 0.2s; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { color: #d9b978; border-color: #d9b978; }

narrative.overview: The design system is a bold, high-contrast visual identity designed for bespoke luxury. It rejects generic SaaS and startup aesthetics in favor of a raw, craftsmanship-focused layout. The theme features a light-themed, asymmetrical grid structure on the homepage (bg-warm-white) that acts as a museum showcase for the physical footwear. The inner pages utilize a deep, premium dark layout (bg-obsidian) to house workflows like the custom order experience. Spacing is fluid, layouts are asymmetric, and content visibility is never gated.
keyCharacteristics: Rejection of generic SaaS shadows and rounded cards.
Dark theme for custom order tools, light theme for brand storytelling.

rules.name: The High-Contrast Ground Rule
rules.body: Body text must always meet a minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio. Muted gray text is strictly forbidden; text must be crisp obsidian on light pages, or warm-white on dark pages.

rules.name: The Gold Accent Rule
rules.body: Gold is a highlight, not a paint bucket. Keep gold usage to <=10% of any view to preserve its premium, exclusive feel.

rules.name: The Display Tracking Floor Rule
rules.body: Tightly tracked titles must never go below -0.04em tracking to prevent letter overlap.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces must remain flat. There are no box shadows, drop shadows, or layered glass blurs. We build visual hierarchy with sharp boundaries and contrasting background fills.

dos: Do use asymmetrical layouts for product showcases.
Do maintain a strict flat aesthetic without shadows.
Do center background videos and crop out black margins using CSS.
donts: Don't use SaaS template elements (like rounded icons above headings, glassmorphic cards).
Don't use neon, purple gradients, or generic startup colors.
Don't write body text in light gray; keep contrast high and crisp.
